news.t: GRANITESHARES HITS $6 BILLION AUM AS NVDL SURGES

overview.description: The GraniteShares 2x Long AMZN Daily ETF (AMZZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in consumer discretionary equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Amazon stock. AMZZ was launched on Mar 4, 2024 and is issued by GraniteShares.

data.title: GRANITESHARES HITS $6 BILLION AUM AS NVDL SURGES
data.text: Leveraged ETFs linked to NVDA ( NVDL) and COIN ( CONL) drive increased trading and AUM Trading volumes exceed $2.2 BILLION on softer CPI data (06/12/24) Rising demand for the firm's leveraged ETFs h...
